title: Tagine Egg Bake
description: A flavorful egg dish inspired by North African cuisine, featuring a rich tagine sauce.
instructions: Crack eggs into a bowl and whisk them together.
In a separate pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the tagine and Russian (Black) Pepper to the pan and stir for 2-3 minutes.
Pour the egg mixture over the tagine mixture.
Transfer the pan to the oven and bake for 15-20 minutes.
Remove from oven and serve hot.
